About

Hi, I’m Kıvanç, a sound designer and composer for games. Over the years, my path in audio has taken me through a range of roles and disciplines. With degrees in Jazz and Sonic Arts, my background spans from arranging jazz to designing interactive music systems for games.

I create stylistically accurate and technically well-structured audio tailored to each game’s needs. I’ve worked as the full-time audio department for two game studios and continue to collaborate on projects as a freelance sound designer. The games I’ve worked on have explored themes ranging from sci-fi and medieval worlds to farming, house decoration, and even vampires.

If you’d like to learn more about my experience or get in touch, feel free to reach out.

Services

Sound Effects Design

I craft responsive, immersive sound effects built around your game's feel — from UI clicks to full environmental ambience.

Middleware Integration

I implement and optimize Wwise and FMOD pipelines to keep your audio system clean, flexible, and performance-ready.

Music Composition

I compose original scores and adaptive music that evolve with your game and stick with your players.

Contact

For game audio projects and general inquiries, please get in touch!

Toronto, Canada
